elements.title: John David Rogers
elements.contents: ... that John David Rogers represented Australia at the Japanese surrender in Singapore in September 1945 (video featured)?

elements.title: Coffee Houser Sei Addata
elements.contents: ... that the lyricist of "Coffee Houser Sei Addata" wrote its last lyrics on a cigarette packet?

elements.title: John Robert Cozens
elements.contents: ... that a John Robert Cozens painting set the record auction price for an 18th-century English watercolour at £2.4 million?

elements.title: Moffat distillery
elements.contents: ... that the design of the Moffat distillery building reflects the style of the surrounding farm buildings?

elements.title: Russian voice actress
elements.contents: ... that the Russian voice actress who portrayed the lead role in the top two highest-grossing Russian films of all time is also an accomplished ice skater?

elements.title: 4-Way Noise Explosion
elements.contents: ... that a reviewer said that the musicians on the Christian music compilation 4-Way Noise Explosion would prompt a wave of people leaving Christianity?

elements.title: Kurt Wright
elements.contents: ... that Kurt Wright did not seek reelection to the Burlington City Council due to federal regulations that would have made him leave his radio show?

elements.title: Cheyenne Mountain Complex
elements.contents: ... that the Cheyenne Mountain Complex is the alternate command center for both the North American Aerospace Defense Command and the United States Northern Command?

elements.title: Dawn McMillan
elements.contents: ... that a teacher was fired for reading Dawn McMillan's book I Need a New Butt! to his second-grade class?
